name: java-review
description: Opinionated Java code review skills (Spring Boot-focused). Auto-detects stack (Spring Boot starters, JPA, Lombok, Vavr, Resilience4j, Spock, RabbitMQ, etc.) and applies only rules for tools in use. Single-agent and 6-parallel-subagent (incl. a clean-code lens agent) variants. Manual invocation only.
